name: OVRDARK - Horror game comes to Meta

reviews.review_title: Couldn’t get past half way point
reviews.review_description: I really wanted to like this game, and until around the mid point I was enjoying it quite a bit! Yes, there were some bugs, including one where I was suddenly 8 feet tall, but they were short lived and not very often. Unfortunately, at the mid point there is this door that needs four objects. I couldn’t find one of them though I looked and looked, so I consulted a walkthrough. It showed where the missing item was and…it’s just not there in mine! It made it impossible to continue. Getting half way through a game to find out you have to start over with no guarantee it won’t happen again ruined it.

I'm not a fan of horror, but thought I'd give this a try because in the description it said I would be exploring a mansion, which I love. I hate being scared, but the puzzles and visuals even that out. I like the story too. I try to close my eyes when something scary is about to happen. Luckily the music kinda gives me a warning. It's a very nice game. Looks great. I love old spooky mansions. Thanks!

reviews.review_title: It's a mind Fu@k inside this house.
reviews.review_description: This is more of a phycological thriller than an "in your face" horror.  Yes, there are a few "jump scares" that will get you to think twice about continuing, but overall, it is a game of puzzles, problem solving and wandering around a very old spooky house.  You can easily spend many lost hours attempting to figure out where to go and what to do. The biggest problem with "story driven" games like this is, once you have completed it, there's no reason to ever go back.  It's a fun game (experience) and if you find it on sale, and you like puzzle solving games, then this is for you.

This is 😱 had me trying to figure out too stop 🛑 playing it or just be a hero in a horror movie not even no what going too happen this game is very fun and scary thanks best wishes and good work u guys

reviews.review_title: Great game pay no attention to childish
reviews.review_description: Excited to give this a go real soon. Love these kind of games and will update later on. Update .......Game is fantastic and has a layers of fear vibe to it ,don't listen to the whiny reviews here ppl complain about long hands lol seriously 🤣 and give crappy ratings,  easy to pick up items . Some ppl here I'm sure would complain about their fries getting cold just eat them and shut up . It's super creepy and has so much suspense as I explore and game looks fantastic great graphics. If u love puzzle games with a horror twist u will love this game.

developer_response.body: Hey there! really happy to hear about this! We are so glad you had a such a great time with it, giving the creeps to nice people like you is our passion 👻

reviews.review_title: Very disappointing and too many bugs
reviews.review_description:
For a Quest 3 only game the graphics aren't even up to Quest 2 standards.  Aside from the nicely detailed main menu it looks more like a Quest 1 game.  The art direction is all over the place.  It seems like they're trying for a realistic style yet the people in the game look like plastic store mannequins.

I ran into numerous bugs and poor design choices in just the first few minutes.

The floor height started out too low and dropped even lower if I leaned down to look at something.  During one sequence the game repositioned me in the wrong place so I had to walk forward in my play space to reach an item  and continue. It seems like standing and roomscale play was never even tested once during development.

Turning a key in a lock failed to unlock a door. Pushing forward on the thumb stick let me pass right through the door so that glitch has an immersion breaking workaround.

The belt holster is a small floating ring about at the level of my knees.  It looks too small to fit around even a super skinny waist.

Grasping items is clunky and immersion breaking. The first thing I picked up was a framed photo and my fingers curled right through it.

The game seems like an early prototype. 

I love horror games and I wish there were more on the Quest, but this one's far too sloppy and unfinished to be immersive enough  to be the least bit scary.

I'm requesting a refund.

I gave the game a good chance for the past few days now, but it's just not doing it for me even if it shows promise in places and looks decent outside of some blurry textures (rugs and the like, understandable given its a port from a much more powerful console), but it's overall game design leaves a lot to be desired.
I love classic Survival-Horror and have dozens of escape room and puzzle heavy games (MADiSON VR being the closest to this title, but done much much better there), but this game goes above and beyond aimless wondering and puzzles with zero sign posting.
My objective now leaves me in a room where all I have is 2 pictures and one empty frame, all with 2 buttons under them that do nothing. Nothing else in the room is interactable in the slightest.
Ok, so I wonder some more yet again, now making it to a room with 4 ripped pictures each with different drawings relating to constellations I assume and a red button, each drawn picture having differnt numbers of drawings each from 1 to 4 (apparently this means nothing..). Looking at the ceiling shows said constellations, but there's 6.
No matter the order I tried or logic I put behind my button inputs NOTHING works.
So I've 2 "puzzles", neither of which do anything, no helpful objective, no map, nothing but bordum..
Also,outside of the hands being a bit miscalibrated (an issue complained about even in the original release, not a big deal though), I had a room completely disappear after awhile. Reloading the game doesn't even bring it back, and if I walking in there I fall into a black void as the game's mansion gets higher and higher above me...
So when I would inevitably need to go through there again (the left door when facing the fireplace with the table and save point infront of a staircase),  I wouldn't be able to continue anyway...

So though I'll have to just get a refund, the game cdoes  show promise as I said. It just doesn't offer anything I offer anything I don't get better elsewhere on top of having game design and technical problems.

developer_response.body:
Good morning,
From the Nox Noctis team we are sorry to hear that your gaming experience was not as expected. We are working on the bugs you mentioned and we would like if possible to receive more information from you to add to the next patch of the game.

We would like to receive some more information regarding the hand bug you mentioned, either a screenshot or a more detailed description so that we can update the game for you and new users to enjoy OVRDARK.

Thank you for your feedback, and you can contact us at
dev@noxnoctisgames.com

EDIT:
Hi there! Thanks again for your precise feedback and kind words, we will take those into account to help us on the upcoming bug-fix patches and improve the experience.
We are sorry OVRDARK wasn't for you and we understand it. We hope to meet again on other games in the future!

reviews.review_description:
After the update I noticed a massive difference in lighting and a few bugs have been fixed, great start and can’t wait for more updates in the future… Heart is pounding lol 😂 couldn’t run quicker enough.. 😂 💩 myself Love the game really creepy, enjoying it a lot 😀 just been a quest 3 update, but overall it’s fantastic 😃

Thank you developers

reviews.review_title: OVRDARK IS TENSE AND IMMERSIVE  HORROR
reviews.review_description:
This game  it does not rely on cheap jumpscares the fear comes from the atmosphere the puzzles and the constant feeling of danger the riddles are well designed some are really challenging and exploring the mansion feels creepy but addictive

I really liked the stealth moments when you have to hide from Mike and try not to move it creates real tension and makes your heart race those moments are some of the best in the game

The save system needs some improvement I lost my manual save because the game auto saved after a scene I also had a bug when replaying the ending where the number pad did not show up so I could not finish it again and I still wonder if the boarded up doors are meant to be opened or are just there to confuse us

I hope they add achievements and better save options in the future still I really recommend it if you like psychological horror with smart puzzles and real tension

I just finished it and I'm still processing the ending. Its one of those horror games that doesn't abuse the easy jumpscare, but it does keep you with that tension as you explore the mansion. The setting is creepy and gives the costant feeling of being watched. The puzzles werent especially hard  to me, which I actually appreciate.

Definitely a game to keep in mind if you like pretty solid horror and puzzle games.
I really enjoyed this. Great game does need some polishing but loved it

I had to restart twice in the opening 10 minutes, as I couldn’t move not physically move or do anything 
, if these are fixed and patches added I will continue to be impressed.
It the game I have been waiting for, will definitely up my score if bugs can be fixed.

reviews.review_title: If you like horror games, grab it
reviews.review_description: It's a nice game, the graphics are cool and there are no super jumpscares. Good puzzles and story.

reviews.review_title: Tolles Spiel . mal auf meinem Kanal

reviews.review_description: Awesome game keep up the good work 👏
